{{Quote|It's called a C.O.L.D.—Command Override Limpet Droid. New Sith technology.|[[Jor Torlin]]|<ref name="Legacy (2006) 10">[[Legacy (2006) 10|''Legacy'' (2006) 10]]</ref>}}
The '''Command Override Limpet Droid (C.O.L.D.)''' was an espionage [[Droid/Legends|droid]] developed by the [[One Sith]] around [[137 ABY]].

==Characteristics==
These small [[Ion limpet/Legends|limpet]]-like [[Droid/Legends|droids]] could magnetically attach to the hull of a [[Starship/Legends|starship]] or [[Airspeeder/Legends|airspeeder]], and allowed its owner to override the onboard controls. The droid was fitted with a small propulsion device enabling [[Realspace/Legends|space]] travel. Commonly, multiple C.O.L.D units were deployed against ships the size of or larger than a [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]].

==Usage==
During the summit between [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Mingo Bovark]] of the [[Fel Empire|Imperial]] forces loyal to [[Roan Fel]] and [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gar Stazi]] of the [[Core Fleet|Galactic Alliance Core Fleet]] on [[The Wheel/Legends|the Wheel]] in [[137 ABY]], six C.O.L.D. droids were deployed by [[Jor Torlin]] against Bovark's [[Nune-class Imperial shuttle|''Nune''-class Imperial shuttle]]. The droids took command of the onboard [[Computer/Legends|computer]], allowing Torlin to remotely control the ship's [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolaser]] and use it to [[Skirmish on The Wheel|attack]] Admiral Stazi's ship.

==Appearances==
*[[Legacy (2006) 10|''Legacy'' (2006) 10]] {{1st}}
